translations: But if they turn away then say
Sufficient for me (is) Allah (There is) no
On Him I put my trust And He
(is the) Lord (of) the Throne the Great
puzzle.hint: A powerful declaration of complete trust (Tawakkul) in Allah, especially when facing opposition.
puzzle.arabic: فَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَقُلْ حَسْبِىَ ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ ۖ وَهُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
puzzle.verseEn: But if they turn away, [O Muḥammad], say, "Sufficient for me is Allāh; there is no deity except Him. On Him I have relied, and He is the Lord of the Great Throne."
